prestazioni: Garrett GTX3582R turbocharger upgrade for the Lambda II 3.3L V6 T-GDi (G6DH) engine, paired with a custom 4-inch titanium-aluminide turbine wheel and billet compressor wheel for 22 psi of boost, targeting 550 whp on E85 with a supporting fuel system including dual Bosch 044 high-flow fuel pumps and Injector Dynamics ID1700x injectors

Full 3.5-inch turbo-back exhaust system by Armytrix Valvetronic with 304 stainless steel mandrel-bent piping, 100-cell catalytic converters, and electronically controlled butterfly valves for backpressure optimization, reducing turbo lag by 18% and improving spool by 450 RPM

Ohlins Road & Track coilovers with 30-way adjustable damping, 20mm adjustable ride height, and Swift Springs (8K front / 10K rear spring rates) specifically valved for the Stinger GT's 53/47 weight distribution, paired with polyurethane subframe bushings from Whiteline and a Cusco 22mm rear sway bar for reduced body roll under high-G cornering
estetica: Liberty Walk LB-WORKS widebody conversion kit (Kia Stinger GT-specific) with carbon fiber fenders, extended rocker panels, and integrated canards, increasing front track width by 50mm and rear by 65mm for aggressive stance and improved tire clearance for 295/30R20 Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires

Seibon Carbon fiber hood with dual functional vents and integrated NACA ducts for direct intercooler airflow, reducing intake temps by 12°C under full boost, paired with a custom carbon fiber front splitter by Varis Japan with adjustable dive planes for aerodynamic balance at high speeds

Custom rear diffuser by Rocket Bunny (Stinger GT-specific) with integrated titanium exhaust tips by Akrapovic, carbon fiber side skirts, and a 1,200mm wide rear wing with dual-element Gurney flaps and 3D-printed aluminum supports, generating 180 lbs of downforce at 120 mph while maintaining OEM+ aesthetics
